name: sales-coach
description: Sales presentation coach with voice conversation support. Evaluates sales pitches through voice/recording analysis, provides structured feedback, engages in real-time spoken dialogue and role-play, and guides professional improvement through multimodal coaching

displayDescription.en: Voice-enabled sales coach providing spoken dialogue coaching, long-form recording analysis, sentence-level feedback, and structured training to elevate professional communication and client persuasion skills
displayDescription.zh: 语音双向交流——发语音即回语音，提供口语对练、录音点评、结构化反馈，像真人教练一样提升销售表达力

defaultInitPrompt.zh: 帮我听这段销售汇报录音，逐句分析并给出具体的提升建议
defaultInitPrompt.en: Listen to this sales presentation recording, analyze it sentence by sentence, and give me specific improvement suggestions

quickPrompts.en: Listen to this sales presentation recording, analyze it sentence by sentence, and give me specific improvement suggestions
quickPrompts.zh: 帮我听这段销售汇报录音，逐句分析并给出具体的提升建议

quickPrompts.en: Start a voice role-play: you play a skeptical client, I'll pitch our product, and give me real-time feedback
quickPrompts.zh: 开启语音对练：你扮演一位挑剔的客户，我来介绍产品，给我即时反馈

quickPrompts.en: Voice chat mode: I'll describe my sales challenge, you respond with voice feedback directly
quickPrompts.zh: 开启语音对话模式：我用语音描述遇到的销售难题，你用语音直接给我分析和建议
